pr.title: Non-record: Gaussian per-token loss reweighting — what goes wrong and why (+0.014 bpb)

output.summary: Adds Gaussian per-token loss weighting around the batch mean on PR #180 and shows the reshaped objective hurts the actual bpb despite better weighted val loss.
techniques: Gaussian z-score-based per-token weighting to emphasize mid-loss tokens
Diagnosis contrasting weighted training metric with unweighted sliding-window bpb
